case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERE VS. C. MILLER CONSTRUCTION, INC., A SUSPENDED CA. CORP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF KRISTINA L. HILLMAN RE: ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERE NCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION #713

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERE NCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION #713
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-25-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERE MOTION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED-NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
